'''''Challenge'' 58''' was a roleplaying magazine published in [[March]] of [[1992]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Battle for Mandalore]]" and was written by [[Chris Hind]].
